# Stand Firm in the Face of Adversity
## Scripture
"Count it all joy, my brothers, when you meet trials of various kinds, for you know that the testing of your faith produces steadfastness." – James 1:2-3

## Reflection
As men, we often face trials and challenges that can test our resolve, our faith, and our resolve to stand firm. But we are not alone in this fight. We have a God who is with us, who strengthens us, and who provides us with the courage to stand firm in the face of adversity. James reminds us that trials are an opportunity to grow our faith, to become more steadfast, and to trust in God's sovereignty. When we face challenges, let us not be fearful or discouraged. Instead, let us count it all joy, knowing that God is at work in us, refining us, and making us stronger.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 5 miles while praying for God to give you strength to stand firm in the face of adversity."
